text: "Honestly, the big thing for me is structure — I want headers, clear sections, something a reader can scan and navigate. I also think code examples are non-negotiable for technical docs, because prose descriptions of how code works are almost always less clear than just showing it. The other thing I care about a lot is calibrating to the audience: I write assuming the reader is a competent engineer, they just haven't seen *this* system before, so I don't want to over-explain general concepts but I do need to explain the specific decisions we made here."
